title: Minecraft SSBU Menu BGM
description: Introduces three music tracks from Minecraft X Smash Bros to the title screen.
body:
It was awesome to see Steve and Alex join Smash Bros, and they brought some good music with them. This pack replaces the menu music with the Super Smash Bros Ultimate remix versions of Halland/Dalarna, Earth, and _**Clockwork Crafter**_ (new in v1.1.0); with supported music toasts in English US.
